name: DDLC: Music Club Edition! | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
The Literature Club? What's that? It doesn't exist! Because it's now the MUSIC CLUB! Start a band with the Doki's! (Re-written Doki's!)

Music Mania!

See what I chose!

Not really related! :)

Well, this has been a long time suggestion from a specific member in my Discord Server. I'm simply giving bro what he wants, he has waited long enough! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — No Angst, no Horror and no Smut! (Though, you'll do it anyway. I'm not gonna stop you. Lol.)

  • The Scenario! — The Literature Club is no more! Its now a Music Club! With Monika being the most skilled member and leader ofc! I have added some new music based tweaks to the girls personalities and favorite bands/genres! And eve their instrumental talents, and I've left it up to you on where you wanna go in terms of ROLEPLAY and instrumental/vocal choices! Have fun! 🙏🏻💙

  • ANYPOV! — The Doki's like you regardless of gender, like usual! 💙

  • Note! — This was a suggestion for me to make in my Discord Server!

That's about it! 🙏🏻💙

As usual, leave a review if you enjoyed! And tell me what you did! And of course, if you yourself have any ideas or wants, join my Discord and there's a chance I may make your suggestion! 💙

My Discord: HERE!

Apparently memes are back... Lemme know if y'all see these. If so, mems are returning to BIOS!
creator: GhostOfOmi
